ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "alternate_names" TEXT /* Any alternate names for the satellite */,
  "registry_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the UN Registry */,
  "operator_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the operator or owner */,
  "operator_owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator or owner of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the satellite launch */,
  "expected_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the satellite in years */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor responsible for the satellite */,
  "contractor_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the contractor */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site of the satellite */,
  "launch_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch vehicle used */,
  "cospar_number" TEXT /* COSPAR number of the satellite */,
  "norad_number" TEXT /* NORAD number of the satellite */,
  "new_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new purpose of the satellite */,
  "new_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new country associated with the satellite */,
  "new_year" INTEGER /* Year of new information */,
  "new_month" INTEGER /* Month of new information */,
  "new_day" INTEGER /* Day of new information */,
  "avg_dis" REAL /* Average distance from Earth in kilometers */,
  "new_period" REAL /* New period of the orbit */,
  "log_period" REAL /* Logarithm of the period */,
  "log_mass" REAL /* Logarithm of the mass */,
  "log_dis" REAL /* Logarithm of the distance */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the satellite */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date of decommissioning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_operator_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_operator_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_owner_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_new_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_registry_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("registry_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_launch_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_vehicle_id") REFERENCES launch_vehicles ("launch_vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator or owner */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbit_types" (
  "orbit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit type */,
  "orbit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the orbit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the orbit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "launch_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_sites_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_vehicles" (
  "launch_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch vehicle */,
  "launch_vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the launch vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the launch vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the contractor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contractor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contractors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's country */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satellite launched */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "launch_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch vehicle used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_orbit" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satellite */,
  "orbit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the orbit type */,
  "longitude_geo" REAL /* Longitude of the GEO in degrees */,
  "perigee" INTEGER /* Perigee altitude in kilometers */,
  "apogee" INTEGER /* Apogee altitude in kilometers */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the orbit */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit in degrees */,
  "period" REAL /* Period of the orbit in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id", "orbit_type_id")
)
